tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests use a mix of AST parsing (structural analysis of the code) and subprocess mock-execution (_MOCK_SCRIPT runs the actual function with mocks and records events). The mock-execution tests (test_ipc_collect_in_loop, test_ipc_collect_after_barrier) actually execute the code and verify behavioral event ordering, not just text matching.
